name: Factorial of N
description:
The factorial of a non-negative integer n, denoted by n!, is the product of all positive integers less than or equal to n.

The factorial of 0 is defined as 1.

  • n! = n * (n-1) * (n-2) * ... * 1
  • 0! = 1

For example:

  • 5! = 5 * 4 * 3 * 2 * 1 = 120
  • 3! = 3 * 2 * 1 = 6

Your task is to implement a function that calculates the factorial of a given integer n.
